name: @uniview/feature
description: AI capabilities grow like ivy 鈥?Feature provides the structure to guide them along a disciplined path

scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm test && pnpm run build && cp ../../README.md ../../LICENSE .
scripts.release: pnpm test && git add -A -- ':!docs-site' && (git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates') && pnpm version --no-git-tag-version patch && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "$V" && git tag "v$V" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm test && git add -A -- ':!docs-site' && (git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates') && pnpm version --no-git-tag-version minor && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "$V" && git tag "v$V" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm test && git add -A -- ':!docs-site' && (git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates') && pnpm version --no-git-tag-version major && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "$V" && git tag "v$V" && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:beta: pnpm test && git add -A -- ':!docs-site' && (git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates') && pnpm version --no-git-tag-version prerelease --preid beta && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "$V" && git tag "v$V" && git push origin HEAD --tags
scripts.release:rc: pnpm test && git add -A -- ':!docs-site' && (git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates') && pnpm version --no-git-tag-version prerelease --preid rc && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "$V" && git tag "v$V" && git push origin HEAD --tags
scripts.release:promote: pnpm test && git add -A -- ':!docs-site' && (git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates') && pnpm version --no-git-tag-version "$(node -p "require('./package.json').version.replace(/-.*/, '')")" && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "$V" && git tag "v$V" && git push origin main --tags

author: Uniview Z03325
